title: 04836_Refining_Generative_Process_with_Discriminator_Guidance_in_Score-based_Diffusion_Models
positive_examples: Achieves state-of-the-art results on image generation tasks, improving sample quality and diversity in datasets like ImageNet, CIFAR-10, and CelebA/FFHQ.
The proposed Discriminator Guidance method enhances the realism of generated samples, making them indistinguishable from real data, which can benefit applications in creative industries.
negative_examples: Potential for misuse in generating deepfake images, which can lead to misinformation and privacy violations.
The computational cost associated with training the discriminator and generating samples may contribute to increased energy consumption.
